title: DN14 6BZ, Kemira Chemicals (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/TP3135PX/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Kemira Chemicals (UK) Limited Installation name: Kemira Chemicals (UK) Limited  *Permit number: EPR/TP3135PX/V005  "
